content_markdown: What is meant by the statement that the average albedo of the Moon is 0.1?

diagram_metadata.description: No diagram provided in the image.

options.label: A
options.text: 10% of the radiation incident on the Moon is absorbed by its surface

options.label: B
options.text: 10% of the radiation emitted by the Moon is absorbed by its atmosphere

options.label: C
options.text: 10% of the radiation incident on the Moon is reflected by its surface

options.label: D
options.text: 10% of the radiation emitted by the Moon is at infrared wavelengths

vibe_explanation: Albedo is defined as the ratio of the total scattered (reflected) power to the total incident power. Therefore, an albedo of 0.1 means that 10% of the incoming radiation is reflected back into space, while the remaining 90% is absorbed.
